channel.title: Karthik Raja V — Blog
channel.description: Writing about test engineering, product building, and the journey from idea to shipped product.

item.title: MedSBOM — I Built the Missing Open-Source FDA Compliance Tool
item.description: How I built and shipped MedSBOM — a free, open-source tool that turns raw SBOM scans into FDA-submission-ready documentation in seconds, not weeks.

item.title: How I Built AI Bug Analyzer — From Test Failure to JIRA Bug in 60 Seconds
item.description: AI Bug Analyzer automatically analyzes CI/CD test failures with Claude Opus 4.6 on Azure AI Foundry and files fully-structured JIRA bugs — cutting bug triage from 30 minutes to 60 seconds.

item.title: How I Built a Performance Testing Framework That Scales to 75K Devices
item.description: Deep-dive into building an E2E performance testing framework for a digital surgery platform, scaling from 30 to 75K+ devices.

item.title: Pipeline Qualification: How I Made CI/CD Reports Trustworthy
item.description: Building a pipeline qualification framework for Jenkins CI in regulated MedTech to prove that testing infrastructure itself is reliable.

item.title: Why I Built Vystra Build — From Architect to Product Builder
item.description: How a MedTech test engineer's mindset led to building Vystra Build, a construction management SaaS for Indian contractors.

item.title: Vision Beyond the OR — Post-Operative Recovery Companion
item.description: How I built a post-operative recovery companion at JNJ Hack4Health that helps patients complete daily check-ins and surfaces escalation signals.

item.title: Building in Public: The Vystra Approach
item.description: Why I document every product built — decisions, failures, architecture. The rules of building in public at Vystra.
